info.name: Sany3 Graduation Project API - Server Test Suite
info.description: Import into Postman, set baseUrl to your Railway backend URL, then run folders in order. Auto-generates unique users and captures tokens/IDs.

request.description: Quick check that the SockJS websocket endpoint is reachable.

Realtime chat: connect to {{baseUrl}}/ws with SockJS/STOMP or {{baseUrl}}/ws-no-sockjs. CONNECT header Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}. Subscribe /topic/chatRoom/{{chatRoomId}}. Send to /app/chat/send/{{chatRoomId}} with JSON {chatRoomId,message,messageType}.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test Provider",
  "email": "{{providerEmail}}",
  "phone": "{{providerPhone}}",
  "password": "{{password}}",
  "serviceType": "{{serviceType}}",
  "nationalId": "{{providerNationalId}}",
  "hourlyRate": 250,
  "bio": "Experienced provider for Sany3 API testing.",
  "address": "Test provider address",
  "latitude": 30.0444,
  "longitude": 31.2357,
  "hasCriminalRecord": false
}

request.description: Optional multipart variant. Enable file rows only if CLOUDINARY_URL is configured.
Run at the end only; this blacklists the active token.
